implemented_challenger: wind direction relative to center field
environment.reason: The repository has no frozen pregame forecast, actual roof-open state, park-renovation history, or handed park-factor history. A chronological replay would substitute hindsight or invented context, so the expanded environment model is not promoted.
environment.operational_default: neutral unless the existing live environment option is explicitly enabled

defense.reason: The frozen repository snapshot cannot reconstruct the requested defensive quality features before each game.

umpire.reason: Pitch location and catcher controls are present, but umpire identity coverage is exactly zero. An umpire effect cannot be trained, joined, or evaluated without identity.
